summary.description: One-line description of the code changes made for the upgrade.

changes_made.description: For the human reviewing the PR. Each item is either an edit made to their code (file, what, why — e.g. 'dags/etl.py: airflow.operators.python -> airflow.providers.standard.operators.python') or a decision about their code: a specific usage reviewed and deliberately left unchanged (only when confident no change is needed — ambiguous or risky cases belong in manual_followups). Never revert a bundled-tool edit — if you believe one is wrong for this project, keep it and record it under manual_followups. A decision names the specific usage and where it lives; a list of what you scanned is process, not a decision. Never narrate process: no 'loaded guidance', 'ran scanner/greps', no lists of patterns or tools checked. If nothing else needed migration, say so in a single changes_made item.

manual_followups.description: Changes a human must finish — anything ambiguous or risky left unedited.

files_changed.description: Repository paths edited during the migration.
